k38hoyVvhkE.title: Update: I'm in Michigan!
k38hoyVvhkE.description:
[Transcript] ALEX: Hello, I made it to Michigan! More specifically, in Ferndale which is near Detroit!
I'm here at the DPAN studio where I just unpacked all my equipment. I've been getting everything set up and will continue working on that this week. It's still under construction, but I'm really excited to be here!
I just wanted to share that I've made it here safely. Tomorrow, I'll be back with the regular news broadcasting. Today, I will have someone else covering the top news stories. Thank you!

h8dOib-Zgic.title: Sprint Accessibility Feature
h8dOib-Zgic.description:
[SPONSORED POST] Meet three managers from Sprint Accessibility as they explain how their products and staff provide crucial communication services for our community. 
For more information or to sign up: www.sprintip.com

0av-wKimT9Q.title: #SIGNanimojichallenge [Interview With Bilal Chinoy]
0av-wKimT9Q.description:
Apple's new iOS12 update provides those with iPhone X or above the ability to create videos with an animoji or memeoji faces replacing your "real face." 
Bilal is encouraging all of us to create new videos in the #SIGNanimojichallenge! 
For instructions on how to create one: http://bit.ly/2Nzx7fA or http://bit.ly/2pt2GcC

ve2SjPdhxv4.title: Moth At Deaf Film Camp With Convo
ve2SjPdhxv4.description:
Film is how we exchange and preserve sign language in its purest form.
Deaf Film Camp at Camp Mark Seven is the place where young minds learn from creative professionals. Convo is proud to be part of DFC’s journey since 2013.
This wouldn't be possible without other wonderful sponsors: Communication Service for the Deaf, Inc., BBDO New York, DEAF Inc., Gallaudet University, Route 66 Promotions, ASL NYC, Clare Cassidy Photography, D-PAN: Deaf Professional Arts Network
Founders: Wayne Betts Jr and Stacy Lawrence
More info: deaffilmcamp.com
Most of the footage filmed by: Hunter Luther

8y54C5UiktI.title: Deaf Bing: Deaf Film Camp at CM7 with Convo

ca4QRwcn6Bg.title: Rogan Shannon on Netflix Subtitles [CC]
ca4QRwcn6Bg.description:
Rogan sparked a Twitter movement for Netflix to fix their captioning for several new shows. 
To read a recap of the tweets, go here: https://bit.ly/2Ko9kha

MzoVgNGuDrs.title: Interview with Tim F. Cook, DeafBlind Man In Viral Facebook Post [CC]
MzoVgNGuDrs.description:
This interview was conducted with the help of Chestnut Lake, a place that provides assisted living for deaf, DeafBlind, and seniors. 
Tim gave permission for his video comments to be shared. 
To see the original Facebook post of him that went viral: https://bit.ly/2yUs9mK

uCs7pvg02dE.title: Deaf Missions Feature [CC]
uCs7pvg02dE.description: Deaf Missions is a Christian organization based in Council Bluffs, Iowa that works to translate the Bible in ASL and reach Deaf people worldwide. [www.deafmissions.com]

gL9n_OOU4jA.title: Short Bus (Behind-the-Scenes)
gL9n_OOU4jA.description:
Here’s a peek at the making of Convo’s production, SHORT BUS teaser trailer! 
Learn more about the people involved, the story, and audition details. jointheshortbus.com 
Download Convo today: convo.click/2p1SJUY

vjndaf5k7Mg.title: Interview with Sheri Ann Farinha, LEAD-K National Director [CC]

vi4MuOpuhcg.title: West Virginia Schools for the Deaf and Blind
vi4MuOpuhcg.description: Did you know there is a thriving deaf and blind school in West Virginia? It is currently led by a Deaf superintendent -- Dr. Martin Keller, Jr. The campus in Romney has been a second home to generations of students and staff.  [CC]

B7ovyGxt_xk.title: Gallaudet Athletics Department
B7ovyGxt_xk.description:
[Sponsored Post] The athletic director, coaches, staff, and players from within Gallaudet University's Athletics Department explain their jobs, philosophy, and what makes the program unique.
Transcript: https://www.dailymoth.com/single-post...

5XDn22CL-ig.title: Interview with Roberta "Bobbi" Cordano, Gallaudet's 11th President
5XDn22CL-ig.description: Ms. Cordano is Gallaudet's first Deaf female president.

p7qOW9H42Bs.title: Tom Anderson: Austin Deaf Realtor
p7qOW9H42Bs.description:
Austin is one of the fastest-growing cities in the U.S. Deaf realtor Tom Anderson will show you three different homes in the same price range. [CC] 
Website: http://deafrealestate.com/

1Dtihc3VSiQ.title: Nyle DiMarco #DWTS 22 Champion: Austin Deaf Club Viewing Party
1Dtihc3VSiQ.description: The Deaf community in Austin came together to watch Nyle win the Mirror Ball champion! He is an inspiration and a light for our community.

viB8JR7fVxE.title: Q/A with Nyle: #DWTS Week 9
viB8JR7fVxE.description:
Where does Nyle get his confidence from? What kind of pressure is he feeling this week as he enters his second straight reality show competition finale? #DWTS
To see the #BeyoutifulConvo video with Nyle DiMarco, go to http://bit.ly/22gfAX5

SkqPrjECefg.title: Interview with Amber Farrelly, Esq.
SkqPrjECefg.description:
A judge in Burnet County, Texas threatened to put a defense lawyer for a Deaf client in jail for contempt of court because she refused to pay for an interpreter. 
(This lawyer had to file for an extension because she had a scheduling conflict, but it was past the 24-hour time window for cancellations and the court ended up with the bill for a session that didn't happen).

r8phb11nrS0.title: Q/A With Nyle: DWTS Week 6
r8phb11nrS0.description: Why did he pick "The Mask" character? What about judge Len's blunt comments about Nyle comparing himself to Val? #DWTS

Exjh4uwEBhM.title: FSDB Protest
Exjh4uwEBhM.description:
There's been a rally at the front of the Florida School for the Deaf and Blind campus for more than a week to protest audism and an epidemic of staff and faculty with poor signing skills. #FIGHTAUDISMFSDB. [CC]
Transcript: https://youtu.be/Exjh4uwEBhM
[There was a repeated question during the interview with PODs -- "Why protest now?" The fifth question was supposed to be, "What demands do you have and when will the protest stop?"]

sQDnLDY2bPk.title: Q/A With Nyle: DWTS Week 5
sQDnLDY2bPk.description: Why was Monday night so emotional? What about the judges' scores? #DWTS

Uy8_vATO-Mk.title: Sign1News Democratic Presidential Debates with ASL interpretation (10.15.19)
Uy8_vATO-Mk.description: Sign1News is the first and only digital network, partnered with world news leader CNN, to offer on-line news and information in American Sign Language. Sign1News provides equal access to local, regional and national news and information to the Deaf and hard-of-hearing community via a daily post-produced broadcast. Sign1News: Your Life. Your Language.
